[Company Letterhead]

29th October 2023

Dr. Tan Wei Ming  
123 Sunshine Avenue  
Singapore 123456

Dear Dr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Project Manager at Quantum Solutions Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 200912345G). Your monthly salary will be SGD 8,500.00, payable according to the company's standard payroll schedule.

Your employment with us is subject to the terms and conditions outlined in this Service Personnel Agreement (the "SPA"), which you will receive separately. Please note that this offer does not include any detailed project plan or project status updates, as those will be provided post-commencement.

You will report directly to Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, our Head of Operations. Should you accept this offer, your start date will be 1st December 2023. We look forward to your contributions to Quantum Solutions.

For any queries, please contact us at +65 6123 4567 or hr@quantumsolutions.sg. Kindly confirm your acceptance by signing and returning a copy of this letter.

Sincerely,

Ramasamy Muthu  
Human Resources Director  
Quantum Solutions Pte. Ltd.  
https://example.sg/user/S1234567D

[Signature Line]

Note: Please retain a copy of this letter for your records.
